name: Hashbrown Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the melted butter and soup. Add 2 cups of cheese, sour cream, salt, and pepper (if desired).
2. Stir in the cubed potatoes until well combined.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 9 x 13-inch pan.
4. Top with corn flakes and the remaining cheese.
5. Cut the remaining butter into thin slices and arrange on top of the casserole, covering as much surface area as possible.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes.
